title: Facelift Urban Scene Generator
content:
# Facelift Urban Scene Generator

Authors: Joglekar, Sagar
Published: 2019-05-20T15:34:40Z
Subjects: Arts and Humanities, Computer and Information Science
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/BNJECP

This dataset contains the Urban scene generator trained on the Augmented streeview dataset. The model is trained in Caffe. The Model can be tested with the demo code seen here : https://github.com/sagarjoglekar/FaceliftGenerator The dataset contains the caffemodel weights and the generator description in the prototext file.

Citation: Joglekar, Sagar, 2019, "Facelift Urban Scene Generator", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/BNJECP, Harvard Dataverse, V1
